# SQL Data Warehouse Project

This project demonstrates the design and implementation of a modern data warehouse using SQL Server. It covers the complete data warehousing lifecycle, including data ingestion, ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes, dimensional data modeling, and analytical reporting.

## Project Objectives
- Build a scalable and structured data warehouse in SQL Server.
- Develop ETL pipelines to clean, transform, and load data.
- Design fact and dimension tables using dimensional modeling techniques.
- Generate analytical insights to support business decision-making.

## Technologies Used# SQL Data Warehouse Project

## 📖 Introduction

This project demonstrates the design and implementation of a modern SQL Data Warehouse using SQL Server. The project follows industry-standard data warehousing practices and implements a Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers) to transform raw data into analytics-ready datasets.

The objective is to build a scalable and maintainable data warehouse solution that supports business intelligence, reporting, and data analysis. This project was developed by following the Data With Baraa SQL Data Warehouse tutorial and serves as a practical implementation of ETL processes, dimensional modeling, and data quality management.



# 📌 Project Overview

The project focuses on building an end-to-end data warehouse solution that integrates data from CRM and ERP source systems.

### Key Features

- Data ingestion from multiple source systems
- Layered Medallion Architecture
- ETL pipeline development using T-SQL
- Data cleansing and transformation
- Data quality validation checks
- Dimensional data modeling
- Creation of fact and dimension tables
- Reporting-ready analytical datasets

### Project Objectives

- Build a scalable and structured SQL Data Warehouse.
- Develop robust ETL pipelines for data processing.
- Design optimized fact and dimension tables.
- Implement data quality validation checks.
- Support business reporting and analytical workloads.



# 🔗 Important Links

### Project Resources

- Data With Baraa SQL Data Warehouse Tutorial
- SQL Server Documentation
- Project GitHub Repository

*(Add the actual links here)*



# 🚀 Project Steps

### 1. Data Extraction (Bronze Layer)

- Extract raw data from CRM and ERP systems.
- Load source files into the Bronze layer.
- Preserve source data without modification.

### 2. Data Transformation & Cleansing (Silver Layer)

- Remove duplicate records.
- Handle missing values.
- Standardize formats and naming conventions.
- Apply business transformation rules.
- Perform data quality validations.

### 3. Data Modeling (Gold Layer)

- Create dimension tables.
- Create fact tables.
- Build analytical data models.
- Prepare business-ready datasets for reporting.

### 4. Analytics & Reporting

- Enable business intelligence reporting.
- Support KPI tracking and analysis.
- Provide trusted datasets for dashboards and analytics.



# 📋 Project Requirements

### Functional Requirements

- Load source data into Bronze Layer.
- Transform and clean data in Silver Layer.
- Create dimensional models in Gold Layer.
- Implement ETL workflows.
- Perform data quality checks across all layers.

### Technical Requirements

- SQL Server
- SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS)
- T-SQL
- Git & GitHub

### Data Sources

#### CRM System

- Customer Information
- Product Information
- Sales Information

#### ERP System

- Customer Records
- Product Categories
- Sales Transactions

### Architecture Layers

#### Bronze Layer
Stores raw source data exactly as received from source systems.

#### Silver Layer
Contains cleaned, validated, and transformed data.

#### Gold Layer
Contains business-ready fact and dimension tables optimized for analytics and reporting.



# 📂 Repository Structure


sql-data-warehouse-project/
│
├── datasets/
│   ├── source_crm/
│   └── source_erp/
│
├── docs/
│   └── data_architecture.png
│
├── scripts/
│   ├── bronze/
│   │   └── load_bronze.sql
│   │
│   ├── silver/
│   │   └── load_silver.sql
│   │
│   ├── gold/
│   │   ├── dim_customers.sql
│   │   ├── dim_products.sql
│   │   └── fact_sales.sql
│   │
│   └── quality_checks/
│       ├── bronze_checks.sql
│       ├── silver_checks.sql
│       └── gold_checks.sql
│
├── README.md
└── LICENSE

# 👨‍💻 About Me

Hello! I'm **Sowmya**, an aspiring Data Analyst passionate about Data Analytics, Data Engineering, SQL, and Business Intelligence.

### Skills

- SQL & T-SQL
- SQL Server
- PostgreSQL
- Data Warehousing
- ETL Development
- Power BI
- Excel
- Data Modeling


## 🙏 Acknowledgements

Special thanks to the Data With Baraa SQL Data Warehouse tutorial for providing the guidance and inspiration for building this project.
- SQL Server
- T-SQL
- ETL Processes
- Data Warehousing
- Dimensional Modeling
- Business Analytics

## Project Workflow
1. Data Extraction
2. Data Transformation and Cleansing
3. Data Loading
4. Data Modeling
5. Analytics and Reporting

## Expected Outcomes
- Well-structured data warehouse architecture
- Optimized fact and dimension tables
- Reliable ETL workflows
- Actionable business insights through SQL analysis
